name: Pineapple Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat margarine or butter and sugar with an electric mixer on medium speed for 1 minute, scraping the sides of the bowl frequently.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating on high speed until the mixture is light and fluffy, about 2 minutes total.
4. Gently fold in the crushed pineapple, bread cubes, and chopped pecans.
5. Pour the batter into a buttered 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
6. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Serve with Carmel Fluff if desired. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
Carmel Fluff
1. In a chilled bowl, beat 2 cups chilled whipping cream, 3/4 cup packed brown sugar, and 1 teaspoon vanilla until stiff peaks form.
2. Cover the bowl tightly and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving. Any leftovers should be stored in the refrigerator.
